monolito-obsidiana.name: Obsidian Monolith
monolito-obsidiana.lore: The unalterable database. Where the first line of the Sanctuary code was written.

martillo-thorvalds.name: Thorvalds Hammer
martillo-thorvalds.lore: Forged in the original kernel to crush bugs and consolidate resilient systems.

escudo-firewall.name: Firewall Shield
escudo-firewall.lore: An impenetrable holographic barrier. Nothing enters the perimeter without the correct handshake.

llave-maestra-ssh.name: SSH Master Key
llave-maestra-ssh.lore: Absolute root access. Opens the doors to the deepest layers of infrastructure.

motor-v8.name: Chrome V8 Engine
motor-v8.lore: Raw execution power. The heart that pumps the fluidity of the interface.

casco-centinela.name: Sentinel Helmet
casco-centinela.lore: Eternal vigilance. Grants HUD vision over all logs in real-time.

cubo-docker.name: Docker Cube
cubo-docker.lore: An encapsulated universe. Total portability and thermal isolation of data.

espada-git.name: Sword of Git
espada-git.lore: Cuts through merge conflicts with a single stroke. Divides time into parallel branches.

trono-backend.name: Backend Throne
trono-backend.lore: Built with active rack servers. The seat of the one who orchestrates the cloud.

orbe-latencia.name: Zero Latency Orb
orbe-latencia.lore: A sphere that bends space-time to deliver data instantaneously.

arquitecto-supremo.name: The Supreme Architect
arquitecto-supremo.lore: The representation of absolute order. The creator of the sovereign ecosystem.

pluma-pixeles.name: Pixel Pen
pluma-pixeles.lore: Writes the aesthetics that the human eye loves. Inexhaustible RGB ink.

espejo-responsivo.name: Responsive Mirror
espejo-responsivo.lore: Reflects the user's soul, adapting to any frame or device.

flor-loto-css.name: CSS Lotus Flower
flor-loto-css.lore: Blooms with smooth 60fps animations. Pure cascading beauty.

prisma-color.name: Color Prism
prisma-color.lore: Decomposes light into perfect OKLCH palettes, harmonizing day and night.

telar-hilos.name: Loom of Threads
telar-hilos.lore: Interweaves React components to form complex digital organisms.

mascara-musa.name: Muse Mask
mascara-musa.lore: The captivating visual identity. Protects the creative essence of the brand.

copa-empatia.name: Empathy Cup
copa-empatia.lore: Overflows with understanding of the user's journey. Human-centered design.

collar-accesibilidad.name: Accessibility Collar
collar-accesibilidad.lore: Shines brightly to guide all visitors, leaving no one behind.

danza-scroll.name: Scroll Dance
danza-scroll.lore: Ballet shoes that glide through the page without friction, in perfect sync.

aura-framer.name: Framer Aura
aura-framer.lore: A halo of magnetic particles that give life to static movement.

gran-disenadora.name: The Grand Designer
gran-disenadora.lore: The experience weaver. Manipulates holographic interfaces with the mind.

pato-goma-dorado.name: Golden Rubber Duck
pato-goma-dorado.lore: The silent counselor. Listening to it resolves the most inexplicable errors.

taza-cafe-infinito.name: Infinite Coffee Cup
taza-cafe-infinito.lore: Fuel for deployment nights. Maintains temperature in the server vacuum.

bug-frasco.name: Bug in a Jar
bug-frasco.lore: A captured anomaly. It no longer causes damage, it's now a curious feature.

gafas-erudito.name: Scholar Glasses
gafas-erudito.lore: Allow reading the source code behind physical reality. Matrix vision.

gato-teclado.name: Keyboard Cat
gato-teclado.lore: The true author of half the code. Sleeps over the CTRL+C.

pergamino-stackoverflow.name: StackOverflow Scroll
pergamino-stackoverflow.lore: Ancient wisdom copied and pasted. The solution to all human doubts.

paradoja-puntoycoma.name: Semicolon Paradox
paradoja-puntoycoma.lore: The small symbol that has the power to bring down digital empires.

sombrero-blanco.name: White Hat
sombrero-blanco.lore: Absolute power used for the protection and integrity of the Sanctuary.

terminal-fantasma.name: Ghost Terminal
terminal-fantasma.lore: A screen that only appears to those who know the universe's secret commands.

404-perdido.name: The Lost 404
404-perdido.lore: A map of a place that doesn't exist. The quest for unreachable knowledge.

entidad-ia.name: AI Entity
entidad-ia.lore: Intelligence that learned to create. The final link between logic and intuition.
